rules.name: Schema validation required
rules.description: Every API response must be validated against its expected schema, not just status code

rules.name: Auth matrix testing
rules.description: Each endpoint must be tested with: correct role, wrong role, expired token, no token

rules.name: Pagination boundary testing
rules.description: Paginated endpoints must be tested for: first page, last page, beyond-last page, page_size=0, negative page
rules.applies_to: Endpoints with page_id and per_page parameters

rules.name: Error response structure
rules.description: Error responses must have consistent structure with error code and message

rules.name: Response timing threshold
rules.description: API responses should complete within acceptable time
rules.note: Thresholds in ms. Exceeding is a warning, not a failure.

rules.name: Idempotency for GET
rules.description: GET requests with same params must return same data within a test run
rules.check: Call GET twice, compare response bodies

rules.name: CRUD consistency
rules.description: After POST/PATCH, a subsequent GET must reflect the change
rules.check: Create/Update -> GET -> verify new values present

rules.name: No hardcoded IDs
rules.description: Tests must obtain IDs from setup steps or API responses, never hardcode
